name: china-industrial-economics-skills
description: An opinionated agent skill stack for manuscripts targeted at 《中国工业经济》, the industrial-economics flagship of the CASS Institute of Industrial Economics — built around empirical engineering, the robustness arms race, and actionable industrial policy.

plugins.name: china-industrial-economics-skills
plugins.description: Thirteen-skill bundle covering the 《中国工业经济》 manuscript lifecycle: workflow router, fit positioning, topic selection, literature review, institutional background, multi-period DID / event-study identification, mechanism, heterogeneity, the signature robustness arms race, tables/figures with economic-magnitude interpretation, actionable policy implications, submission preflight, and rebuttal.
